item.title: First reading, referred to Health Care & Wellness.

item.title: 👍Connie Gilfillan - Meals on Wheels People, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington
item.description: Connie Gilfillan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Meals on Wheels People, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington.

item.title: 👍Emily Hanning - Lifelong Health for All, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington
item.description: Emily Hanning signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Lifelong Health for All, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington.

item.title: 👍Jeremy Vrablik - Cascadia Produce
item.description: Jeremy Vrablik signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Cascadia Produce.

item.title: 👍Lianna Olds - Emergency Food Network, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington
item.description: Lianna Olds signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Emergency Food Network, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington.

item.title: 👍Owen Esperas - Meals on Wheels Spokane, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington
item.description: Owen Esperas signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Meals on Wheels Spokane, Medically Tailored Meals Coalition of Washington.

item.title: 👍Jillian Moore - Mom's Micro Garden
item.description: Jillian Moore signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Mom's Micro Garden.
